creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
In the menu xfce-4.12_1 doesn't show icons apache-openoffice-4.1.2.

root@vladiom:~ # pkg info | grep apache-openoffice
apache-openoffice-4.1.2        Integrated wordprocessor/dbase ...

In the desktop files, for example calc.desktop, set icon "openoffice-4.1.2-calc", but that icon don't exists:
root@vladiom:/usr/local/share/applications/openoffice-4.1.2 # grep Icon calc.desktop
#Icon=openoffice-4.1.2-calc
Icon=openoffice4-calc

For example:
root@vladiom:/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps # ls | grep openoffice4-calc
openoffice4-calc.png

root@vladiom:~ # uname -srm
FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p8 amd64
